overview: Tier 1 Health and Wellness provides bioidentical hormone replacement therapy and preventative medicine via telemedicine to patients worldwide. The clinic specializes in hormone optimization for menopause, testosterone deficiency, PCOS, and erectile dysfunction in men and women over 40.
highlights: Telemedicine to patients worldwide, no referral required
Specializes in menopause, testosterone deficiency, PCOS, and erectile dysfunction
targetAudience: Men and women over 40 seeking hormone optimization and preventative medicine.
